title: BAHCO 1/2" Drive Quick Release Reversible Ratchet
features: High quality CrV steel with a nickel and matte chrome finish
Quick-release function for easy and safe operation
description: The Bahco 1/2in drive Quick Release Reversible Ratchet with 60 teeth and 6° action angle. Made from high quality CrV steel with a nickel and matte chrome finish. It has a quick-release function for easy and safe operation. There is also a quick, easy direction change lever on the wrench head. Fitted with a comfortable non-slip two-component handle. An integrated hanging hole makes it easy to store. Standards: ISO 3315/1174-2, DIN 3122/3120.
